message.content:
Explore the iskrib_v3 project at C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3 to understand the design system and component patterns used around the ContentViewer. Specifically find:

1. CSS variables / theme definitions (look for :root, var(--bg-primary), var(--border-light), var(--text-muted), var(--bg-pill), var(--bg-backdrop) etc.)
2. The comments component at client/src/components/comments/comments.jsx - how it looks and integrates
3. The postCards component to understand card design patterns
4. The Editor component to understand how content is rendered (especially editor CSS classes like editor-paragraph, editor-heading-h1, etc.)
5. Any global CSS or layout files that affect the ContentViewer
6. The HomePage layout to understand how ContentViewer sits within the page

Be thorough - check for CSS files, theme files, and any design tokens used across the app.

Perfect! I now have enough information to provide a comprehensive report. Let me compile all the findings:

## ISKRIB_V3 Design System & Component Patterns Report

Based on my thorough exploration of the iskrib_v3 project, here's a complete analysis of the design system and component patterns surrounding the ContentViewer:

---

### 1. CSS VARIABLES & THEME DEFINITIONS

**Location:** `/C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\index.css`

The root CSS file defines a comprehensive two-tone color system (light and dark themes):

#### **Light Theme (default)**
```css
:root {
  /* Background Colors */
  --bg-primary: #ffffff;
  --bg-secondary: rgb(250, 250, 250);
  --bg-hover: rgb(245, 245, 245);
  --bg-elevated: rgb(255, 255, 255);
  --bg-backdrop: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.23);        /* glassmorphism effect */
  --bg-backdrop-heavy: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.575); /* heavier blur */
  --bg-overlay: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.089);
  --bg-pill: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);                  /* subtle pill backgrounds */
  --bg-glass: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.23);           /* glass effect */
  --bg-glass-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35);
  --bg-card: #FAFAF8;                              /* card base color */

  /* Text Colors */
  --text-primary: rgb(4, 20, 29);        /* main text */
  --text-heading: rgb(15, 23, 30);       /* headings */
  --text-secondary: rgb(75, 75, 75);     /* secondary text */
  --text-body: rgb(100, 100, 100);       /* body text */
  --text-muted: rgb(130, 130, 130);      /* muted/metadata */
  --text-faint: rgb(150, 150, 150);      /* very faint text */
  --text-separator: rgb(190, 190, 190);  /* dividers/separators */

  /* Border Colors */
  --border-light: rgba(151, 151, 151, 0.168);
  --border-card: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);

  /* Shadow Effects */
  --shadow-card: 2px 2px 10px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.182);
  --shadow-modal: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);

  /* Accent Colors */
  --accent-purple: rgb(94, 66, 255);
  --accent-dark: rgb(4, 20, 29);         /* primary action button */
  --accent-dark-hover: rgb(16, 56, 79);
  --accent-sage: #6B8F71;                /* secondary action color */
  --accent-amber: #F59E0B;               /* highlight/warning color */

  /* Icon Colors */
  --icon-default: #5e5e5eff;
  --icon-view: #00000044;
  --icon-view-count: #00000099;

  /* Fonts */
  --font-serif: "Lora", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
  --font-ui: "Inter", "Nunito", sans-serif;
}
```

#### **Dark Theme** `[data-theme="dark"]`
Inverts the scheme with darker backgrounds and lighter text colors while maintaining the same variable names.

---

### 2. COMMENTS COMPONENT ARCHITECTURE

**Location:** `/C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\comments/`

#### **comments.jsx** - Key Features:
- Uses **Framer Motion** for slide-in animation (from bottom)
- **Infinite scroll** with `useInfiniteQuery` (10 comments per page)
- Comment counter with live update (max 200 characters)
- Nested reply system with expand/collapse
- Uses **MoonLoader** and **BarLoader** spinners
- Integrates with auth context for user identification

#### **comments.css** - Key Classes:
```css
.comment-parent-container          /* main modal container with shadow */
.close-comment-bttn                /* close button */
.comments-section                  /* scrollable comment list */
.comments-cards                     /* individual comment card */
.comment-user-metadata-container   /* author info row */
.comment-avatar-container          /* avatar with optional badge ring */
  .comment-avatar-ring-legend      /* gold ring (#FFD700) */
  .comment-avatar-ring-og          /* purple ring (#9B59FF) */
.comments-input-container          /* textarea + button wrapper */
.comments-input                    /* textarea field */
.comment-submit-button             /* submit button */
.comments-counter-container        /* character count display */
.reply-button                      /* toggle reply input */
.reply-comment-input-container     /* nested reply area */
.see-more-comments-button          /* pagination button */
```

**Design Highlights:**
- Modal positioned absolutely with `z-index: 4`
- Border-left accent (3px solid) for visual hierarchy
- Uses `var(--bg-primary)` for consistency
- Avatar rings use specific brand colors (gold/purple) for verified badges
- Custom scrollbar styling with blue tint

---

### 3. POST CARDS COMPONENT - Card Design Patterns

**Location:** `/C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components/HomePage/postCards/postcards.css`

#### **Core Card Structure:**
```css
.cards                          /* card container */
  .card-image-banner           /* featured image */
  .card-content                /* content wrapper */
    .user-info                 /* author info row */
      .user-avatar-container   /* author avatar + badge rings */
      .user-newsfeed-name      /* author name */
      .user-post-date          /* timestamp */
    .content-container         /* title + text wrapper */
      .feed-title              /* post title */
      .feed-text-content       /* preview text */
    .card-icons-container      /* action bar */
      #card-icons              /* like/comment/bookmark group */
      #card-icons-view         /* view count display */
      .reading-time-container  /* estimated read time pill */
```

#### **Card Design Features:**
- **Hover Effects:** 
  - Box shadow elevation
  - Image opacity fade
  - Subtle transform (translateY -2px)
- **Avatar Badge Rings:**
  - Legend: Gold ring (#FFD700) with glow
  - OG: Purple ring (#9B59FF) with glow
- **Icon Interactions:**
  - Like: Red fill on hover with pink background
  - Comment: Sage green accent
  - Bookmark: Amber accent
- **Typography:**
  - Title: "Lexend Deca" font, 1.1rem, bold
  - Body: "Lora" serif, 0.88rem, lighter weight
  - Metadata: "Inter"/"Nunito", 0.75rem, muted color

#### **Reading Time Pill:**
```css
.reading-time-container
  background-color: var(--bg-pill)           /* subtle background */
  border: 1px solid var(--border-card)
  border-radius: 10px
  .reading-time-text                         /* sage green text */
    color: var(--accent-sage)
    font-size: 0.62rem
    font-weight: 550
```

**Responsive Behavior:** At 480px breakpoint:
- Two-row footer layout (author info full-width, then action icons)
- Smaller image banner (160px vs 220px)
- Adjusted padding and font sizes
- Author name truncation with ellipsis

---

### 4. EDITOR COMPONENT & CSS CLASSES

**Location:** `/C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src/components/HomePage/Editor/`

#### **Theme Configuration (in App.jsx & ContentView.jsx):**
```javascript
const theme = {
  paragraph: 'editor-paragraph',
  heading: {
    h1: 'editor-heading-h1',
    h2: 'editor-heading-h2',
    h3: 'editor-heading-h3',
  },
  text: {
    bold: 'editor-text-bold',
    italic: 'editor-text-italic',
    underline: 'editor-text-underline',
  }
}
```

#### **Editor CSS Classes (editor.css):**

**Text Formatting:**
```css
.editor-text-bold      { font-weight: bold; }
.editor-text-italic    { font-style: italic; }
.editor-text-underline { text-decoration: underline; }
```

**Editor Container:**
```css
.editor-parent-container           /* full-screen overlay */
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.089)
  backdrop-filter: blur(25px)
  z-index: 130

.editor-container                  /* modal box */
  width: 60% (desktop), 90% (mobile)
  height: 80%
  background-color: rgb(4, 20, 29) /* dark theme */
  border-radius: 15px
  padding: 1rem

.content-title-input               /* title field */
  background: transparent
  border: 1px solid rgba(151, 151, 151, 0.168)
  color: rgb(255, 255, 255)
  font-size: 1.5rem
  font-weight: 650

.editor-shell                      /* editable content area */
  height: 400px
  overflow-y: auto
  custom scrollbar: blue (#1b5779) thumb
```

**Editor Controls:**
```css
.editor-close-bttn                 /* X button */
  padding: 0.5rem
  border-radius: 50%
  hover: rgb(15, 41, 56)

.editor-lower-part-container       /* toolbar + buttons */
  border: 1px solid rgba(151, 151, 151, 0.168)

.toolbar-bttns                     /* formatting buttons */
  width: fit-content
  padding: 0.5rem
  border-radius: 10px
  hover: rgb(15, 41, 56)

.editor-save-bttn                  /* save button */
  background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255)
  color: rgb(4, 20, 29)
  font-weight: 650
  border-radius: 15px

.editor-save-bttn-disabled         /* disabled state */
  background-color: rgb(185, 185, 185)

.is-active                         /* active toolbar button */
  background-color: rgb(52, 123, 255)
  box-shadow: glow effect
```

**Image Handling:**
```css
.image-wrapper                     /* image container */
  position: relative
  margin: 1rem 0

.image-delete                      /* delete button overlay */
  position: absolute
  border-radius: 50%
  transition: ease 0.1s

/* Resize Handles (8 directional) */
.southeast-side-handle             /* bottom-right */
.southwest-side-handle             /* bottom-left */
.northeast-side-handle             /* top-right */
.northwest-side-handle             /* top-left */
.east-side-handle                  /* right edge */
.south-side-handle                 /* bottom edge */
.north-side-handle                 /* top edge */
.west-side-handle                  /* left edge */
  width: 8-12px
  height: 8-20px
  background: rgba(151, 151, 151, 0.168)
  border: 1px solid white
  cursor: resize (with direction)
```

**Image Editing:**
```css
.dimension-display                 /* size tooltip */
  position: absolute top: -35px
  background: rgba(151, 151, 151, 0.168)
  font-size: 0.8rem
  border-radius: 4px

.image-loading-overlay             /* upload progress */
  background: rgba(4, 20, 29, 0.6)
  border-radius: 5px

.image-loading-spinner             /* animated spinner */
  border: 3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)
  border-top: 3px solid rgb(40, 115, 255)
  animation: image-spin 0.8s linear infinite
```

---

### 5. CONTENTVIEWER COMPONENT INTEGRATION

**Location:** `/C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client/src/components/HomePage/ContentViewer/`

#### **ContentView.jsx** - Key Features:
- Uses **Lexical Editor** for rich text rendering (read-only mode)
- Integrates **CommentSection** component below content
- Like/Bookmark/Follow mutations with optimistic UI updates
- Dynamic bookmark success message animation
- Back button with scroll-triggered visibility
- Avatar badge rings for user status
- Reading time calculation integrated

#### **contentviewer.css** - Main Classes:

**Container:**
```css
.content-viewer-container          /* main wrapper */
  display: flex
  flex-direction: column
  width: 100%
  height: fit-content
  background-color: var(--bg-primary)
  border-left: 0.7px solid var(--border-light)
  border-right: 0.7px solid var(--border-light)

.back-button-container             /* fixed sticky header */
  position: fixed
  display: flex
  gap: 1rem
  padding: 1rem
  width: 718px (desktop)
  height: 50px
  background-color: var(--bg-backdrop)
  backdrop-filter: blur(25px)

.back-button                       /* back arrow button */
  padding: 0.2rem
  border-radius: 50%
  hover: rgb(85, 85, 85)
```

**Content Display:**
```css
.content-title-container           /* metadata + title wrapper */
  margin-top: 100px
  width: 90%
  gap: 1rem

.content-title                     /* post title */
  font-weight: 900
  line-height: 52px
  font-size: 4rem
  letter-spacing: -0.011em

.content                           /* body text */
  width: 90%
  font-size: 18px
  font-weight: 450
  line-height: 28px
  letter-spacing: -0.003em

.content-metadata-container        /* author row */
  display: flex
  align-items: center
  gap: 0.6rem
  padding: 1rem 0

.content-avatar-container          /* author avatar */
  width: fit-content
  border-radius: 50%
  .content-avatar-ring-legend     /* gold badge */
    border: 2px solid #FFD700
    box-shadow: 0 0 8px 1px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.3)
  .content-avatar-ring-og         /* purple badge */
    border: 2px solid #9B59FF
    box-shadow: 0 0 8px 1px rgba(155, 89, 255, 0.3)

.content-avatar                    /* img element */
  width: 30px
  height: 30px
  border-radius: 50%
  object-fit: cover

.content-owner-name                /* author name link */
  font-weight: 660
  font-size: 0.8rem
  hover: text-decoration underline

.follow-bttn / .unfollow-bttn      /* action button */
  font-size: 0.8rem
  padding: 0.3rem 0.5rem
  border-radius: 20px
  border: 0.7px solid rgb(151, 151, 151)
  .unfollow-bttn:hover
    color: rgb(255, 78, 78)

.content-created                   /* date/time display */
  display: flex
  gap: 0.2rem
  .content-created p
    font-size: 0.8rem
    font-weight: 500
    color: var(--text-muted)

.read-time                         /* reading time pill */
  padding: 0.2rem 0.8rem
  background-color: var(--bg-pill)
  border-radius: 15px
  font-size: 0.6rem
```

**Action Bar:**
```css
.icons-container                   /* like/comment/bookmark row */
  display: flex
  gap: 2rem
  align-items: center
  height: 50px
  border-top: 0.7px solid var(--border-light)
  border-bottom: 0.7px solid var(--border-light)

.like-button / .comment-button / .bookmark-button
  display: flex
  justify-content: center
  align-items: center
  padding: 0.5rem
  border-radius: 50%
  transition: ease 0.3s
  
  .like-button:hover
    background-color: rgba(255, 161, 161, 0.295)
    .svg-like path { fill: rgb(255, 116, 116); }
  
  .comment-button:hover
    background-color: rgba(149, 223, 255, 0.274)
    .svg-comment path { fill: rgb(47, 154, 255); }
  
  .bookmark-button:hover
    background-color: rgba(169, 255, 209, 0.358)
    .svg-bookmark path { fill: rgb(72, 208, 135); }

.content-view-countlike / .content-view-countComments / .content-view-countBookmarks
  font-size: 0.8rem

.bookmark-message-container        /* success toast */
  position: absolute
  z-index: 11
  background-color: rgb(72, 208, 135)
  color: white
  padding: 1rem 1.5rem
  border-radius: 10px
  top: 180px
```

### 6. HOMPAGE LAYOUT STRUCTURE

**Location:** `/C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client/src/components/HomePage/home.css`

#### **Three-Column Layout:**
```css
.home-parent-container             /* main flex wrapper */
  display: flex
  width: 100%
  height: 100vh
  overflow-x: hidden

.side-bar-holder-container         /* left sidebar */
  position: fixed
  width: 250px
  height: 100%
  border-right: 0.7px solid var(--border-light)
  z-index: 2

.center-bar-holder-container       /* main feed (ContentViewer sits here) */
  left: 250px
  display: flex
  flex-direction: column
  width: 750px
  height: 100vh

.sidebar-right-holder-container    /* right sidebar */
  position: fixed
  left: 1000px
  width: 27%
  height: 100%
  border-left: 0.7px solid var(--border-light)
```

#### **Header/Navigation:**
```css
.newsfeed-header                   /* header with nav links */
  position: fixed
  background-color: var(--bg-backdrop)
  backdrop-filter: blur(25px)
  width: 750px
  height: 90px
  border-bottom: 0.7px solid var(--border-light)
  z-index: 1
```

#### **Profile Editor Modal:**
```css
.profile-editor-bg                 /* overlay */
  position: absolute
  background-color: rgba(141, 141, 141, 0.2)
  backdrop-filter: blur(5px)
  z-index: 3

.profile-editor                    /* modal */
  background-color: rgb(4, 20, 29)
  border-radius: 15px

.edit-profile-name-input / .edit-profile-bio-input
  background-color: transparent
  border: none
  color: #ffffff

.camera-icon-container             /* avatar edit button */
  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.644)
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px)
  hover: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.342)
```

#### **Responsive Breakpoints:**
- **768px:** Sidebar shrinks to 200px, center becomes 550px
- **428px/480px:** Single column, sidebar hidden, full width content

---

### 7. GLOBAL CSS & DESIGN TOKENS SUMMARY

#### **Color System:**
- **Light backgrounds:** white, off-white (#FAFAF8)
- **Dark backgrounds:** Very dark blue (rgb(4, 20, 29))
- **Glassmorphism:** Backdrop filters with 25px blur
- **Accent palette:** Purple, Sage Green, Amber, Gold, Silver

#### **Typography System:**
- **Default font:** "Nunito" (sans-serif)
- **UI font:** "Inter", "Nunito"
- **Serif font:** "Lora" (for body content)
- **Decorative:** "Comfortaa", "Lexend Deca", "Sniglet", "Shadows Into Light"

#### **Border Radius Scale:**
- **Buttons/small elements:** 50% (circular) or 10-15px
- **Cards/modals:** 12-15px
- **Inputs/pills:** 10px

#### **Shadow System:**
- **Cards:** `2px 2px 10px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.182)`
- **Modals:** `0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)` / `0.4`
- **Comment box:** `0 5px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)`

#### **Spacing Scale:**
- **Gap/margin base:** 0.5rem, 0.8rem, 1rem, 1.5rem, 2rem
- **Padding base:** 0.3rem, 0.5rem, 1rem, 1.5rem

#### **Z-index Hierarchy:**
- Sidebar: 2
- Navigation header: 1
- Profile editor: 3
- Comments modal: 4
- ContentViewer: 3
- Editor: 130-132
- Editor modal: 200+

---

### 8. KEY DESIGN PATTERNS USED

1. **Glassmorphism:** `backdrop-filter: blur(25px)` with semi-transparent backgrounds
2. **Badge Rings:** Gold (#FFD700) and Purple (#9B59FF) with glow effects for user status
3. **Hover States:** Subtle background color changes + icon color fills
4. **Transitions:** `ease-in-out 0.1-0.3s` for smooth interactions
5. **Character Counters:** Live update with overflow color change (red)
6. **Sticky Headers:** Fixed positioning with blur background for content awareness
7. **Skeleton Loading:** `MoonLoader`, `BeatLoader`, `BarLoader` from react-spinners
8. **Read Time Pills:** Subtle background pills with calculated reading duration
9. **Avatar Containers:** Optional badge rings for verified/OG users
10. **Infinite Scroll:** Pagination with "See more" buttons

---

### 9. IMPORTANT CSS NOTATIONS

**In comments.css:**
```css
.comments-section::-webkit-scrollbar {
    width: 6px;
}
.comments-section::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background: rgb(27, 87, 121);
    border-radius: 4px;
}
```
Custom scrollbar uses blue tint matching dark editor theme.

**In postcards.css:**
Avatar badge rings use glowing box-shadow:
```css
box-shadow: 0 0 8px 1px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.3); /* Legend */
box-shadow: 0 0 8px 1px rgba(155, 89, 255, 0.3); /* OG */
```

**In contentviewer.css:**
Lexical editor theme maps to standard classes that need CSS definitions (not found in editor.css - may be inherited from Lexical library):
- `.editor-heading-h1`, `.editor-heading-h2`, `.editor-heading-h3` (used but not explicitly styled in provided CSS)

---

This comprehensive design system ensures consistency across the iskrib_v3 application with a focus on glassmorphism, clean typography, and accessible color contrasts in both light and dark modes.
